overview: Ruby Storm is a red combo deck that leverages cheap spells and mana acceleration to cast Jeska's Will for lethal damage. It uses pump spells like Seething Song to boost the win condition while maintaining early pressure. The deck aims to close games quickly before opponents can establish board control or draw answers.
win_conditions: Casting Jeska's Will for lethal damage
Boosting Jeska's Will with Seething Song or other pump spells
Overwhelming opponents with early aggressive threats and spell synergy

keep_criteria: Hands with early mana sources and acceleration
At least one cheap spell or pump spell
Access to Jeska's Will by turn 3 or 4
mulligan_criteria: Lack of early interaction or card draw

early_game: Play lands and activate Ruby Medallion for mana acceleration
Cast cheap spells to build storm count and draw cards
Apply early pressure with low-cost threats
mid_game: Stabilize board state and continue drawing cards
Set up pump spells and ensure Jeska's Will is accessible
Disrupt opponent's game plan with targeted removal
late_game: Execute Jeska's Will combo for lethal damage
Use remaining pump spells to maximize damage output
Maintain card advantage to close out the game

key_cards.name: Jeska's Will
key_cards.notes: Cast for massive damage, ideally on a turn with pump spells to boost the storm count and overall damage.

key_cards.name: Ruby Medallion
key_cards.notes: Activates to produce red mana, enabling faster casting of Jeska's Will and pump spells. Prioritize early activation.

key_cards.name: Seething Song
key_cards.notes: Boosts Jeska's Will damage and adds to the storm count. Cast on the same turn as Jeska's Will for maximum effect.

sequencing_tips: Prioritize mana acceleration in the early turns to enable faster combo execution
Hold pump spells until the turn you plan to cast Jeska's Will
Use cheap spells to build storm count and draw into key pieces
Sequence removal to clear blockers or key threats before going for lethal

matchups.advice: Race their hand size and look for openings to cast Jeska's Will when they lack counterspells.
Use pump spells early to boost Jeska's Will and close the game before they stabilize.
Disrupt their setup with targeted interaction and race to lethal with Jeska's Will.
